MAP.COMMENT: intializing count values for high, low and mid

BRANCH.COMMENT: branch for the high,mid and low

SEQUENCE.NAME: %Product[$iteration]/amount%>1000
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Check the codition for high product amount

MAP.COMMENT: map the high amount products to high list with count high as index

SEQUENCE.NAME: %Product[$iteration]/amount%>500
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Check the codition for mid product amount

MAP.COMMENT: map the high amount products to mid list with countMid as index

SEQUENCE.NAME: %Product[$iteration]/amount%<500
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Check the codition for low product amount

MAP.COMMENT: map the high amount products to low list with countLow as index
